name: Tostados, Refried Beans, and Creamy Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 whole boneless, skinless chicken breast -- pounded flat and thin
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat.
2. Carefully place corn tortilla in hot oil and fry until crisp, flipping the tortilla once. Remove to a paper towel to drain. Season with salt. Cook off remaining tortillas.
3. In a glass dish, combine chicken, garlic, lime juice, chili powder, oregano, and olive oil. Let chicken marinate for 15 minutes.
4. Refried Beans: Heat oil in a heavy saucepan and cook onions until tender. Add beans (drained and rinsed) and water. Bring to a simmer. Stir beans occasionally. Beans are done when they begin to clump together in one mass. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Heat grill, broiler, or cast iron grill pan. Cook chicken breasts for 4 minutes per side or until cooked through. Slice chicken in thin slices and keep warm.
6. In a small bowl, mix together salsa and sour cream. Chill.
7. To assemble tostado: Evenly layer beans, lettuce, tomatoes, chicken slices, red onion, cheese, and cilantro on top of each crisp tortilla. Serve immediately. Garnish with creamy salsa and cilantro.
